items.title: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
items.summary: While the human cost is clear, the Iranian regime has not just survived the war, it has been empowered.

items.title: Why Iran believes deal with US leaves it stronger than before
items.summary: Iran has come out of the war's first chapter stronger than many expected, but its next challenge may be harder, the BBC Persian Service's Amir Azimi writes.

items.title: Moscow residents complain of black rain after largest Ukrainian attack hits oil refinery
items.summary: A refinery and a shopping centre burned after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美伊啟動60天談判窗口  范斯宣布海上封鎖解除、批以色列反應過度
items.summary: 美國與伊朗之間的60天談判窗口於18日正式啟動。美國副總統范斯當天在白宮記者會上證實，雖然談判期從18日起開始計算，但雙方達成的協議已於17日提前生效。  　范斯並宣布，...…

items.title: 高市早苗內閣支持率降到54％ 日媒：恐受「抹黑門」影響
items.summary: 日本時事通信社今天公布最新民調顯示，日本首相高市早苗內閣支持率為54.3％，較5月下滑了5.1個百分點，寫下她上任以來該份民調的最低紀錄。  時事通信社分析指出，高市早苗內閣支持率下滑，...…

items.title: 延長任期法案通過 83歲辛巴威總統將執政到2030年
items.summary: 非洲南部國家辛巴威的國會下議院18日通過1項法案，總統任期確定從5年延長為7年，這意味現年83歲的現任總統姆南加瓦（Emmerson Mnangagwa），將能繼續執政到203...…
